data.title: Warehouses Estates Belgium Announces Agenda for 2025 General Meeting
data.description:
Warehouses Estates Belgium S.C.A. ( (DE:WPK) ) has issued an update.

Warehouses Estates Belgium S.C.A. has announced the agenda for its upcoming Ordinary General Meeting scheduled for April 22, 2025, at its headquarters in Gosselies. The meeting will cover the approval of the annual accounts for 2024, a dividend distribution, and the remuneration report. Shareholders will also vote on the discharge of the Sole Director and Auditor, and the determination of the director’s fees for 2025. The announcement outlines the conditions for shareholder participation, including registration and voting procedures.

More about Warehouses Estates Belgium S.C.A.

YTD Price Performance: 2.45%

Average Trading Volume: 44

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €134.5M

data.title: Tenma Corporation Revises Financial Forecasts Upwards for FY 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from TENMA ( (JP:7958) ).

Tenma Corporation has revised its financial forecasts for the fiscal year ending March 2025, indicating an expected increase in net sales and profits. This adjustment is attributed to a shift in production from China to Southeast Asia, improved production efficiency through automation, and favorable currency exchange rates due to the yen’s depreciation. These changes are anticipated to positively impact the company’s financial performance and stakeholder interests.

More about TENMA

Tenma Corporation operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing and supplying a variety of products, with a significant market presence in Southeast Asia.

data.title: Superactive Group Faces Delays in 2024 Financial Reporting Amid Liquidity Challenges
data.description:
Superactive Group Company Limited ( (HK:0176) ) has shared an announcement.

Superactive Group Company Limited has announced a delay in the publication of its 2024 annual results and a possible delay in the dispatch of its 2024 annual report due to financial constraints. The company is facing liquidity issues, which have hindered its ability to commence the annual audit, potentially leading to non-compliance with Hong Kong Stock Exchange listing rules and a possible suspension of trading.

More about Superactive Group Company Limited

Superactive Group Company Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda, operating with limited liability. It is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and is involved in various business activities, although specific industries and products are not detailed in the announcement.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €3.84M

data.title: I-NET Corp. Expands Insurance Sector Capabilities with ACU Acquisition
data.description:
An announcement from I-Net Corporation ( (JP:9600) ) is now available.

IST-Software Co., Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of I-NET Corp., has acquired ACU CORPORATION, a company specializing in IT consulting and system development for the life insurance industry. This acquisition aims to leverage synergies between IST-Software’s existing insurance business and ACU’s expertise, enhancing their service offerings in the life insurance sector. The immediate financial impact on I-NET Corp. is minimal, but the strategic move positions the company to better serve the diverse needs of life insurance companies, potentially strengthening its market position.

More about I-Net Corporation

I-NET Corp. is a company involved in information processing services, system development services, and sales of system equipment. It operates through its group company, IST-Software Co., Ltd., which is based in Tokyo and focuses on similar business activities.

data.title: Makino Milling Machine Co. Engages in Acquisition Talks with Nidec Corporation
data.description:
Makino Milling Machine Co ( (JP:6135) ) has shared an announcement.

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. has received a proposal from Nidec Corporation to become a wholly-owned subsidiary through a tender offer. The company has been in ongoing discussions with Nidec, sending multiple letters of inquiry to assess the proposal’s impact on corporate value and shareholder interests. Makino has requested Nidec to delay the tender offer commencement and increase the share purchase threshold, but Nidec has yet to provide a definitive response. The outcome of these negotiations could significantly affect Makino’s operational control and market positioning.

More about Makino Milling Machine Co

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on milling machines and related equipment. The company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is recognized for its precision machining solutions.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.92B

data.title: Contango ORE Reports 2024 Earnings and Strategic Progress
data.description:
Contango ORE ( (CTGO) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Contango ORE presented to its investors.

Contango ORE, Inc. is a company engaged in the exploration of gold and associated minerals in Alaska, holding significant interests in various mining projects, including the Manh Choh and Johnson Tract projects. In its latest earnings report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024, Contango ORE reported a net loss of $38 million, primarily due to a substantial non-cash expense from an unrealized loss on derivative contracts. Despite this, the company achieved a total income from operations of $26.3 million and improved its cash position to $20.1 million by year-end.

Key highlights from the report include the successful gold production at the Manh Choh mine, which exceeded expectations with 41,325 ounces of gold produced for Contango’s share. The company has also made significant progress in reducing its debt and hedge obligations, with a 36% reduction in its credit facility and a 30% reduction in its outstanding hedge contracts. Additionally, Contango completed a strategic acquisition of HighGold Mining Inc., enhancing its position in the Johnson Tract project.

Financially, Contango saw a positive shift in its cash flow from operating activities, which provided $0.7 million compared to previous periods of cash usage. The company also received substantial cash distributions from the Peak Gold JV, aiding its financial stability. Investment activities focused on the Peak Gold JV, while financing activities included debt repayments and equity issuance proceeds.

Looking ahead, Contango ORE is focused on maintaining robust cash flow through its gold production and strategic initiatives. The company aims to deliver a preliminary economic assessment for the Johnson Tract project soon, while continuing to advance its exploration and development activities across its projects. With a solid financial foundation, Contango is well-positioned to capitalize on its mining ventures in the coming years.

data.title: Motorsport Games Reports Improved 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Motorsport Games, Inc. ( (MSGM) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Motorsport Games, Inc. presented to its investors.

Motorsport Games Inc. is a developer and publisher of racing video games and esports competitions, known for its official motorsport racing series titles such as the 24 Hours of Le Mans and the FIA World Endurance Championship. The company recently reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, highlighting significant improvements in revenue and a reduction in net loss compared to the previous year.

In 2024, Motorsport Games achieved revenues of $8.7 million, marking a 25.7% increase from the prior year, driven by the successful release of its new game, Le Mans Ultimate. The company also launched a new subscription service, RaceControl, which has been well-received by users. Despite these successes, the company reported a net loss of $3.0 million for the year, a substantial improvement from the $14.3 million loss in 2023.

The fourth quarter of 2024 saw revenues rise to $2.0 million, a 13% increase from the same period in 2023. However, the company experienced a net loss of $2.9 million for the quarter, primarily due to foreign currency losses and the absence of a one-time gain from the sale of its NASCAR License in the previous year. The company’s gross profit margin decreased slightly, reflecting increased costs.

Looking forward, Motorsport Games is focused on continuing to develop its product portfolio and explore strategic partnerships to enhance its financial position. The company acknowledges the need for additional funding to sustain operations and is actively seeking potential equity or debt financing options. Management remains optimistic about the potential for future growth and the expansion of its gaming and esports offerings.

data.title: Olema Oncology Reports 2024 Financial and Clinical Progress
data.description:
Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ( (OLMA) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. presented to its investors.

Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc., operating as Olema Oncology, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing targeted therapies for breast cancer and other conditions, leveraging its expertise in endocrine-driven cancers and nuclear receptors. The company recently released its financial and operational results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, highlighting significant progress in its clinical trials and strategic collaborations. Key developments include the advancement of the pivotal Phase 3 OPERA-01 and OPERA-02 trials for palazestrant, a promising therapy for metastatic breast cancer, and a new collaboration with Novartis, which facilitated a $250 million equity private placement. Olema ended the year with $434.1 million in cash and marketable securities, despite a net loss of $129.5 million, attributed to increased R&D spending on late-stage clinical trials and the development of OP-3136. Looking ahead, Olema aims to continue its momentum by advancing patient enrollment in its clinical trials, presenting mature data from ongoing studies, and expanding its drug discovery capabilities, maintaining a focus on improving outcomes for cancer patients.

data.title: Standard Chartered Announces Vesting of LTIP Shares
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has provided an update.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced the vesting of the first tranche of shares under its 2022-2024 Long Term Incentive Plan (LTIP). This transaction, involving 28,579 ordinary shares priced at £11.908 each, was conducted on the London Stock Exchange on March 19, 2025. This move signifies the company’s commitment to rewarding its leadership and aligning their interests with long-term shareholder value, potentially strengthening its position in the competitive financial services industry.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a leading international banking group, incorporated in England and Wales. The company provides a wide range of financial services and operates primarily in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East, focusing on emerging markets.
